title: Extract and organize reference data from paper's pgfplots files
description:
Extract numerical reference data points from the paper's pgfplots `.tex` files to serve as ground-truth validation targets for all GRAND simulations.

## Source

`~/Projects/so-grand/img_PY/` contains `.tex` files with pgfplots data for all figures in the paper.

## Tasks

1. Parse each figure's `.tex` file to extract (Eb/N0, BLER) and (Eb/N0, BER) data points for all curves.
2. Organize into structured CSV or JSON format, one file per figure.
3. Label each curve with its decoder type (BP, min-sum, SOGRAND turbo, CA-Polar) and code parameters.
4. Store in the repository for automated comparison against our simulation results.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Reference data extracted for at least Figures 1, 3–10.
- Data stored in a parseable format in the repository.
- A comparison utility or script can overlay our results against reference data.
- Data points verified by spot-checking against the paper's figures.

## Location

`dev/reference_data/` or similar directory.
